title: Espoir SMP
description:
The plugin's twist is
⚙️ How the system works:

🧿 You start with 3 souls.
🔻 Each time you die, you lose a soul.
💀 At 0 souls, you become a ghost: spectator mode for 24 hours.
⚔️ Kill a player → you steal one of their souls, if you don't already have all
body:
The plugin's twist is
⚙️ How the system works:

🧿 You start with 3 souls.
🔻 Each time you die, you lose a soul.
💀 At 0 souls, you become a ghost: spectator mode for 24 hours.
⚔️ Kill a player → Only one soul will remain at his death.
💎 Craft a Soul Gem to regain one and ward off death...

💡 Effects based on your number of souls:

🟢 3 souls: Regeneration, speed – You're in great shape!

🟠 2 souls: Less health, strength boost – You're fragile, but dangerous.

🔴 1 soul: Slowness, Strength ++, Hero of the village and even less health – You are a threat… or prey.

⚫ 0 souls: Spectator mode. You wander among the living…

🧪 This plugin is homemade, designed to add real tension to survival.
You die too much? You risk everything. You survive? You become stronger…
